abilities.name: Ancestral Protector
abilities.text: While this model has a Shielded token, enemy attacks targeting other allies within 2" receive a (-).

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

actions.name: Guardian's Glaive
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another ally within 2" gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Auan Protector
triggers.text: Declare the Toss action, targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Scars of Cherufe
triggers.text: Deal 1 irreducible damage to this model. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Rollout
triggers.text: This trigger can only be declared if this action was generated by the Charge action. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target and ignores (warding) abilities.

actions.name: Toss
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This may target friendly models. Target a model of lower Sz than this model.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 10" directly away from this model. If this move is interrupted, the target and all models in base contact with it must pass a TN 14 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage. Falling does not end this movement.
